title: Food safety monitoring and surveillance - Canada.ca
content:
## Food safety monitoring and surveillance
Canada's role in food safety and monitoring and estimating outbreaks due to food-borne illness. Also, how consumers can help.

## Services and information

### Role of government and industry in food safety
Government of Canada policies, regulations and safety standards that protect Canadians from food poisoning.

### The consumer role in food safety
How to report a food safety concern or complaint and how we investigate complaints.

### Tools used in the management of food-borne illness outbreaks
Federal, provincial and territorial protocols for responding to food-borne illness outbreaks.

### Food-borne illness in Canada
Causes of food-borne illness and how Canada estimates the number of related illnesses, hospitalizations and deaths.
About FoodNet Canada and its role in monitoring food-borne illness.
